facts.text: Windsor sits on North Hutchinson Island in Indian River County, just north of Vero Beach.
The community was built as a private, master‑planned residential enclave with elegant homes and a cohesive architectural style.
Windsor’s layout emphasizes pedestrian‑friendly streets, green spaces, and a low‑density seaside feel that sets it apart from typical beachfront developments.
Residents enjoy a private club lifestyle featuring an 18‑hole links‑style golf course by Robert Trent Jones Jr., equestrian grounds, tennis courts, and beach access.
The area is protected by a manatee‑zone marker off North Hutchinson Island, highlighting the sensitive coastal habitat that defines the barrier‑island region.
Art, design, and philanthropy have long shaped Windsor’s identity, with the community noted for stewardship of its coastal setting and a polished coastal atmosphere.
